calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-18-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Sajja Ravinantapricha & Carla Amador, CSR: Maureen Howard #7156 (Department 218)

Appearances:
Petitioner, Danielle Monique Kennedy, is present in propria persona.

This matter comes on calendar this day for an Order to Show Cause hearing re Change of Name. Danielle Monique Kennedy is sworn and examined by the Court.

The matter having been submitted and no objections having been made to the proposed change of name made at the hearing, it appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: DANIEL JADEN KENNEDY. Decree is submitted and signed in open court.
